name: Disappearing Marshmallow Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butterscotch chips and butter or margarine together over low heat, stirring constantly.
2. Cool to lukewarm.
3. Beat in egg.
4. Combine dry ingredients including sugar and stir into melted mixture.
5. Fold in remaining ingredients just enough to combine (about 5 strokes).
6. Spread in greased 9x9 inch pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes. Do not overbake; center will be jiggly but firms up as it cools.
